manual.title: RIBA · User Manual
manual.subtitle: BANTU DIGITAL AUDIO WORKSTATION
manual.desc: The world's first DAW with native asymmetric Bantu Oral Grid quantization (Asiko · Makossa · Bikutsi).

featureList.eq: Per-track 3-band EQ, volume, pan, mute, solo
featureList.metro: Metronome with visual indicator & time signature
featureList.dream: Dream Track AI generation via Emergent LLM
featureList.piano: Piano roll editor (click to add/remove notes)

philosophy.title: The RIBA Phoenix · Philosophy
philosophy.intro: RIBA is more than a DAW: it is a cultural-preservation act. Its name means "root" in several Bantu languages.
philosophy.b1: Core mission: nurture the next generation of producers with African rhythms — no oral groove ever lost.
philosophy.b2: The Phoenix logo embodies rebirth: what seemed gone (oral grooves) is reborn as digital signal.
philosophy.b3: Built for pro studios and neighborhood jam rooms alike — Pro Tools-style ergonomics, Suno-style accessibility.
philosophy.b4: Editable throughout: every preset, every AI call, every export is documented and reproducible.
philosophy.b5: Zero blocking proprietary dependency — Web Audio, local Demucs, free Y.js, transparent Emergent LLM Key.
philosophy.b6: Five native languages (FR · EN · ES · PT · SW) bringing Kinshasa, Lagos, São Paulo, Madrid and Yaoundé into one studio.
philosophy.b7: Open by design: code stays readable, docs are embedded — every musician is a potential contributor.
philosophy.tip: Tip: the 🌐 button in the menu switches the entire UI between the 5 languages on the fly.

grid.title: The Bantu Oral Grid
grid.intro: RIBA's exclusive asymmetric quantization — the first DAW in the world to encode Central-African oral swing explicitly.
grid.b1: Asiko (Wisdom): light 4/4 grid, ternary swing 55-65 % for meditative marches.
grid.b2: Makossa (Roots): energetic 4/4 grid, strong syncopations on beats 2 and 4.
grid.b3: Bikutsi 6/8: Cameroon's emblematic groove — six pulses grouped into two ternaries.
grid.b4: Bikutsi 12/24: micro-rhythmic densification for balafon and drum solos.
grid.b5: Enable "Bantu Swing Live" to humanize playback non-destructively — notes are untouched.
grid.b6: Show the markers on the Timeline to visualise the asymmetric offsets in real time.
grid.tip: Tip: combine two styles by loading an audio reference + Magic Re-mix — the grid adapts automatically.

ai.title: Creative AI · Magic Generator
ai.intro: RIBA merges two worlds: Pro Tools precision and Suno-grade magic. Five AIs collaborate.
ai.b1: Magic Generator (fal.ai stable-audio): build a full track from a title, prompt + vibe.
ai.b2: Dream Track (Claude): produce lyrics / proverbs that lock onto the project tempo.
ai.b3: Magic Re-mix (Demucs ▸ Bantu ▸ fal.ai): import audio, isolate stems, requantize on a Bantu grid, regenerate.
ai.b4: Genesis Workflow: one prompt → 4 mix-ready stems (vocals, drums, bass, others).
ai.b5: Audio reference: 🎙 mic recording or file import — the generated track inherits the timbre.
ai.b6: Bantu Storytelling (Mvett): a theme + Claude yield 4 chapters with automatic arrangement (dynamic tempo + swing).
ai.tip: Tip: drop a proverb into Storytelling and the audio actually tells your story.

collab.title: Advanced production & Studio Live
collab.intro: RIBA is built both for solo work and for multi-musician sessions.
collab.b1: Album Builder: drag-and-drop multiple tracks, auto-mosaic cover, Bantu Drop Map (crossfade teasers).
collab.b2: Promo Cascade: auto-generate 4 × 15 s snippets + schedule publication via APScheduler.
collab.b3: Studio Live Session: add ?session=ID to the URL to open a collaborative WebRTC + Y.js session.
collab.b4: Real-time sync: tempo, mixer (faders, pan, mute, solo), Bantu Grid, swing and storytelling.
collab.b5: Colored cursors on the Timeline + avatars in the TopBar (pulse animation when a peer edits).
collab.b6: Built-in anti-echo (applyingRemoteRef): no infinite loop, sub-50 ms latency.
collab.tip: Tip: send the ?session=my_groove URL to your collaborators — sessions are free and end-to-end encrypted via Y.js.

virality.title: Virality & social sharing
virality.intro: A song only exists once it's shared. RIBA bakes viral export end-to-end.
virality.b1: Bantu Reel (ffmpeg): export a 9:16 vertical video ready for TikTok / Reels with animated waveform.
virality.b2: Reel Snippet Picker: offline RMS analysis surfaces the 3-5 best 30-second sequences.
virality.b3: Auto-share Social: ready structure for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube (drop your OAuth tokens in .env).
virality.b4: APScheduler: schedule your publications across 4 optimal slots per timezone.
virality.b5: Boot Cinematic: 8 s intro exportable as MP4 to brand the head of your videos with RIBA.
virality.tip: Tip: combine Album Builder + Promo Cascade to release an EP over 4 days with auto-teasers.
